clean_headline: DC Infotech and Communication Limited secured a ₹33.46 Crore government cybersecurity order from National Informatics Centre for the National Knowledge Network project.
raw_headline: Clarification sought by the Exchange for Increase in the Volume of Securities of ITI Limited.

clean_headline: Apis India launches new Masala Dates product line in three variants
raw_headline:
The Exchange has sought clarification from ITI Ltd on March 17, 2026, with reference to Movement in Volume.

The reply is awaited.
